verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I think upon Your goodness And Your faithfulness each day I've convinced it's not because I am worthy To be see the kind of love that You give

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But I'm grateful for Your mercy And I'm grateful for Your grace And because of higher part of yourself I have come to sing this song out in praise

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I thank You, I thank You Great and Mighty creator of the world I thank You, I thank You, My King

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Who am I to sing You praises Who am I to worship You It's Your blood that makes the difference in me And made a way to enter into Your throne

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I could not come near Your presence I could never sing your song But the sacrifice on Calvary's tree It's the reason why I cry out today
